title: Common Info Management
description: Manage common information displayed on product detail pages

empty_state.title: Select Common Info
empty_state.description: Select common info from the list on the left or add a new one.

delete.title: Delete Common Info
delete.confirm_message: Are you sure you want to delete '{name}'?
delete.confirm_suffix: Would you like to delete this common info?
delete.warning: All products using this common info will be unlinked.

editing.title: Editing in Progress
editing.confirm_message: Are you sure you want to cancel and select another item?

content_mode_change.title: Change Input Mode
content_mode_change.message: Switching from HTML to plain text will remove all HTML tags. Continue?

set_default.title: Confirm Default Setting
set_default.message: Set this common info as default? The existing default setting will be removed.

copy.title: Copy Common Info
copy.message: Are you sure you want to copy '{name}'?
